name: Extra Bosses

boss.name: Extra Bosses
boss.strategy: The Reaper Boss Lv HP SP Phy Fir Ice Elc Wnd Lgt Drk Floor The Reaper 85 5000 12000 Nul Nul 21st Chest The Reaper spawns after opening 20 chests, after which you will hear chains. He has a chance of being in one of the chests on your current floor. He will disappear after either opening a chest or moving to a new floor. He is very tough if underleveled, and a joke if overleveled. Defeating him has a chance of dropping the ultimate weapon for any character in your party. If everyone in your party

overview: The Reaper spawns after opening 20 chests, after which you will hear chains. He has a chance of being in one of the chests on your current floor. He will disappear after either opening a chest or moving to a new floor. He is very tough if underleveled, and a joke if overleveled. Defeating him has a chance of dropping the ultimate weapon for any character in your party. If everyone in your party has their ultimate weapon, then he will drop the ultimate armor. If everyone in your party has both their ultimate weapon and ultimate armor, then he will drop the Omnipotent Orb.
